description_long: This is a single high-top sneaker with a visibly worn and distressed appearance. The shoe is primarily constructed from brown and gray leather panels, with some areas showing significant scuffing, peeling, and exposed inner lining, especially around the collar and heel. The laces are white and threaded in a standard criss-cross pattern, loosely tied at the top. The midsole is white with a black stripe, and the outsole appears to be made of rubber, though parts of it are missing or heavily degraded. The interior lining is a bright orange-yellow fabric, which is exposed in several places due to the damaged upper. Overall, the shoe exhibits heavy signs of use, with frayed edges, missing material, and a generally rugged texture.
description: A heavily worn high-top sneaker made of brown and gray leather with white laces and a bright orange-yellow lining, showing significant damage and exposed interior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the toe box, laces, and the worn, frayed tongue with exposed orange lining.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the scuffed leather panels, loose laces, and extensive damage around the collar and heel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the most severe wear, with large sections of the heel and collar missing, revealing the orange interior.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the stitched leather stripes, more fraying, and the deteriorated sole.
